rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin → São Paulo), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations land on essentially the same conclusion — strong full-stack/DLang generalist with IDE-adjacent C/C++ work but lacking the required Kotlin/Spring/JVM depth — and the 3-vs-4 score difference falls within ordinary run-to-run noise. None of the variant's reworded strengths or concerns reference the location, nationality, or any age/origin proxy; the reasoning keys entirely off the same skills and experience.
